## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, integration pages, and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrej is stepping down; Sydney Go will be the new account manager for Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [61 integration pages published, 9 in drafts, \~20 being generated (all tier 2 complete, moving to tier 3)](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Content performance: 1,900 clicks, impressions rising (over 1,330)](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Action items: QA on integration pages, updating comparison pages, creating new topics](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes

  - [Andrej Vidovic stepping down from GrowthX by March 31st](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Sydney Go introduced as the new account manager](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Sydney's background: 2 years experience in SEO, previously worked with Canva](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)

### Content Performance

  - [1,900 clicks this week](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Impressions rising, now over 1,330](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [10 new content pieces in the backend](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Running out of approved topics, need to generate new ones](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Integration Pages Status

  - [61 pages published](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [9 currently in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [\~20 being generated (all tier 2 complete)](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Moving on to tier 3 pages](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Goal: Add generated pages to drafts by end of week (Saturday latest)](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### Integration Pages QA

  - [Victor shared QA feedback, still work to be done (mostly internal)](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Paul to address some issues before Theo returns](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Potential Algolia sync issue with search results (e.g., Cloudinary appearing twice)](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### Comparison Pages

  - [Plan to refresh content on existing comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Add cross-linking between competitive blogs and comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Potential new comparisons: Strapi Cloud vs different hosting providers](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Action: GrowthX to conduct quick audit on current rankings](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Proposal: Create templated version with 1,000-1,500 words of content per page](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Start with 5 pages as a test](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Image Generation

  - [Incorporating feedback into new workflow](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Exploring options with AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Goal: Have a batch of images ready before Andrej's departure (March 31st)](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

### Daniel Meeting Follow-up

  - [Action items discussed, including API access to Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Suggestion to add user context field in Airtable for better AI article generation](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Awaiting specific ETAs from Daniel on discussed items](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to have a comprehensive onboarding meeting with Andrej](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Andrej to upload remaining integration pages by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide update on Daniel's ETAs for discussed items](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Paul to address QA issues on integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [GrowthX to start working on comparison page templates (5 initial pages)](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Victor to discuss new component implementation with Theo for related integrations](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct ranking audit on existing comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Andrej to follow up with Daniel for specific timelines on action items](https://fathom.video/share/C-VoLBiE_HxXQgXzY_VjDmPq9NjQWwML?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
